Careers at Smitty’s

Join the team at Smitty’s™ where hospitality isn’t just a job, it’s our passion. With over 80 locations across Canada, we invite those with a natural gift for creating exceptional guest experiences to embark on their next career journey with us.

Our restaurants offer diverse roles tailored for individuals who thrive in a welcoming and service-oriented environment. Using the location finder below, please submit your resume directly to the location you wish to apply at. Your career journey with Smitty’s™ is waiting!

Why Work at Smitty's
Reason #1
You'll be part of a cherished Canadian dining tradition. Starting from a single location in Calgary, AB, Smitty’s™ has grown into a thriving franchise with over 80 locations nationwide. Since 1960, we've been delighting guests with our warm hospitality and serving up all your favourites, all day long.
Reason #2
Smitty’s™ is dedicated to creating vibrant restaurant experiences. With a consistently evolving menu featuring chef-inspired comfort foods and effective marketing strategies, you'll enjoy dynamic days filled with engaging interactions and continuous momentum.
Reason #3
Joining Smitty's™ means becoming part of a supportive and inclusive community. It's not uncommon for our team members to stay with us for over 15 years, a testament to the environment we nurture.
Find a Location
